objective: Run a content workflow with explicit planning, review, approval, and artifact gates.

required_agents.role_spec: Define audience, constraints, production steps, and acceptance criteria.
required_agents.execution_spec: Create a content plan before drafting and block on missing brief requirements.
required_agents.output_spec: Content plan with audience, constraints, artifacts, gates, and review criteria.

required_agents.role_spec: Review claims, completeness, policy constraints, and approval readiness.
required_agents.execution_spec: Approve only when evidence, review notes, and artifacts satisfy gates.
required_agents.output_spec: Review report, approval state, blocked reasons, and missing evidence list.

gates.condition: Brief contains audience, constraints, and required outputs.
Reviewer approval is present before release.
